title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 12 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 12 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 12 2026
summary:
Main
DCE iron ore futures trading was in the doldrums today. The most-traded contract, I2609, eventuallyclosed at 764 yuan/mt, down 0.33% from the previous trading session. Port spot prices were unchanged from the previous day.
